hard_gate.description: Enforcement boundary. Mission aborts on failure. PreToolUse denies unauthorized mutations. SubagentStop blocks invalid results.

recovery.description: Audit trail and compensating action. PostToolUse logs mutations and reverts unauthorized writes by read-only roles.

lifecycle.description: Best-effort context injection or exit coordination. SessionStart loads manifest, SubagentStart injects role context, Stop writes final ledger.

observability.description: Async state preservation. PreCompact snapshots manifest before context window compaction.

PreToolUse.description: Primary mutation gate. Enforces role-scoped tool permissions before every tool execution.

SubagentStop.description: Primary result gate. Validates role result blocks against role-specific schemas.

PostToolUse.description: Audit and compensating recovery. Logs file mutations and auto-reverts unauthorized writes.

Stop.description: Exit coordination. Final ledger entries and cleanup.

SessionStart.description: Context injection on session resume. Loads active mission manifest.

SubagentStart.description: Role context injection with progressive disclosure.

PreCompact.description: State snapshot before context window compaction.
